content: Bootstrap approach: first manually populate Octowiki from the conversation (high-level intent, decisions, invariants), then create the behaviour tree loop to process the same session as its first real input. Manual-first gives a baseline to compare the automated triage against.

provenance.raw_agent: Five pages written: overview, intent-pipeline, inbox, triage-behaviour-tree, decisions. Want to spin up the wiki server?
provenance.raw_user: We should try to bootstrap it with this conversation. Try to come up with the highlevel intent of the project and then fill in some of the decisions and invariants. Maybe have a go manually, and then we can create a behaviour tree on a loop to see how it handles it
